meta.defaultDescription: iDigital is a digital marketing and web development agency based in Qena, Egypt — building digital identities and ad campaigns that deliver real results for clients in Egypt, Saudi Arabia, and the Gulf.

hero.headline: We turn your digital presence into a brand people remember
hero.sub: From Qena, we build websites, ad campaigns, and visual identities for clients across Egypt, Saudi Arabia, and the Gulf — designed with taste, measured in numbers.

services.title: Everything your brand needs, under one roof
services.sub: From the first idea to a performance report you can read

web.title: Web design & development
web.desc: Fast, SEO-ready Next.js websites built to turn visitors into customers.

social.title: Social media management
social.desc: Content, design, and a posting strategy that builds a real community, not just likes.
social.cta: Make your audience follow you, not just see you

ads.title: Google & Meta ads management
ads.desc: Data-driven campaigns targeting the Saudi and Gulf market at the lowest acquisition cost.
ads.cta: Double your customers without doubling your budget

branding.title: Branding & visual identity
branding.desc: A logo and identity system that tells your brand's story at first glance.

seo.title: Search engine optimization
seo.desc: We rank your site on page one with content and technical structure built to last.
seo.cta: Rank on Google before your competitors do

content.title: Visual content production
content.desc: Photography, motion graphics, and short-form video that stop the scroll.
content.cta: Make your content stop the scroll

portfolio.title: Real work, for real clients
portfolio.sub: A sample of the digital identities we built from scratch
portfolio.empty: Our work will be added here soon

about.title: An Egyptian digital agency, built to compete globally
about.body: iDigital is a fully integrated digital marketing agency based in Qena, Egypt. We started as a small team passionate about marketing and design, and now we build digital presence for clients across Egypt, Saudi Arabia, and the Gulf — from clinics and restaurants to recruitment companies.

values.v1: Design without measurable results is just decoration
values.v2: Every client has a different market — one strategy never fits all
values.v3: Speed and taste aren't opposites, you can have both

blog.title: Ideas and notes on digital marketing
blog.sub: Articles we write from our day-to-day work with clients
blog.empty: Our first article is coming soon
